arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim provides update on Bruno Fernandes future: ‘It’s not going to happen’
arts.sum: The Manchester United captain is a reported target for Real Madrid

arts.ttl: The two Man United players handing Ruben Amorim an awkward dilemma
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim has a lengthy in-tray of issues come the summer – and two players’ futures are top of that list

arts.ttl: Nottingham Forest boss Nuno Espirito Santo explains why the Premier League's 'big six' era is coming to an end... and claims the 'gap no longer exists' ahead of Man United clash
arts.sum: Nottingham Forest face Manchester United - a member of the 'big six' group - at the City Ground on Tuesday, aiming to boost their bid for Champions League football next season.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim addresses Bruno Fernandes' future amid talk of Real Madrid lining up £90m bid for the Manchester United captain
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim insists Manchester United can satisfy Bruno Fernandes' ambitions, and has ruled out any chance of his captain leaving Old Trafford this summer.

arts.ttl: Manchester United youngsters suffer penalty heartbreak after surprising Chido Obi decision
arts.sum: Man Utd U18s crashed out of the FA Youth Cup on penalties after giving their all on the pitch for a gruelling 120 minutes.

arts.ttl: Amorim: Fernandes is not leaving Man Utd
arts.sum: Bruno Fernandes will not be leaving Manchester United this summer, says head coach Ruben Amorim - as he can help the club win the Premier League again.

arts.ttl: Bruno to Real Madrid? Amorim's blunt response to latest rumour
arts.sum: Manchester United head coach Ruben Amorim is adamant he wants Bruno Fernandes to remain at the club and that's he not for sale in the summer.

arts.ttl: Forest's Wood 'improving' but a doubt for Man Utd game
arts.sum: Nottingham Forest striker Chris Wood is "improving" from a hip injury, but remains a doubt for Manchester United's visit to the City Ground on Tuesday.

arts.ttl: U18s match report Aston Villa v Manchester United FA Youth Cup 31 March 2025
arts.sum: Murdock again proved his shot-stopping class with another close-range denial, this time of Jamaldeen Jimoh-Aloba, cutting in from the left side of the box. Murdock came up big early in the second half to deny Mason Cotcher from close range before Proctor did the same when Obi’s snapshot came at him minutes later.

arts.ttl: Premier League GW30 predictions: Liverpool to triumph in Merseyside derby, Man United to lose at Nottingham Forest
arts.sum: Sports Mole takes on Chris Buck from electrifying Welsh-formed rock trio Cardinal Black for a Premier League predictions challenge in gameweek 30 of the 2024-25 season.
